title: Manual Nanotrap Concentration and RNA Extraction for SARS-CoV-2 Viral Capture
author: Matthew Cavallo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b2uzqex6
materials: In a separate 1.7 mL tube, add 560 µL of Buffer AVL Qiagen Catalog #19073 and 5.6 µL of Carrier RNA Thermo Fisher Catalog #4382878 . Mix well by pipetting up and down several times.

steps.title: Place a 50 mL conical tube in a tube rack
steps.instruction: Place a 50 mL conical tube in a tube rack.

steps.title: Vigorously shake the sample to re-suspend solids
steps.instruction: Vigorously shake the sample to re-suspend solids. Immediately move on to Step 3.

steps.title: Add 50 mL of wastewater to...
steps.instruction: Add 50 mL of wastewater to the conical tube inside the biosafety cabinet.

steps.title: Transfer 40 mL of the top...
steps.instruction: Transfer 40 mL of the top supernatant into a new conical tube.

steps.title: Add 10 µL of BRSV to the conical tube
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL of BRSV to the conical tube.

steps.title: Add 400 µL of Nanotrap Magnetic...
steps.instruction: Add 400 µL of Nanotrap Magnetic Virus Particles (10) Ceres Nano Catalog #44202 to the sample and invert 2-3 times to mix together and to create a 10:1 sample volume to particle ratio.

steps.title: Invert samples 3-4 times every 5...
steps.instruction: Invert samples 3-4 times every 5 minutes at Room temperature for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Use a magnetic rack to separate...
steps.instruction: Use a magnetic rack to separate the magnetic Nanotrap particles from the sample. Allow the sample to sit in the rack for at least 00:10:00 . Samples must sit in a magnetic rack for at least 10 minutes to allow for particle separation.

steps.title: Use a pipette to discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Use a pipette to discard the supernatant. Be careful not to disturb the red pellet of Nanotrap particles.

steps.title: Add 1 mL of Molecular Grade...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL of Molecular Grade Water ATCC Catalog #60-2450 to the conical tube. Vortex the tube to re-suspend the pellet.

steps.title: Transfer liquid to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer liquid to a 1.7mL tube. Place tubes on magnetic rack and allow to sit for 00:02:00 . Sample in 1.7 mL tube sits in a magnetic rack for 2 minutes. A red pellet of Nanotrap particles congregates to the magnetic side of the 1.7 mL tube.

steps.title: Add 140 µL of 1X PBS to the particle pellet
steps.instruction: Add 140 µL of 1X PBS to the particle pellet. See "Appendix I: Preparing Buffer Solution (1X PBS)" for instructions on how to prepare 1X PBS.

steps.title: In a regular, non-magnetic rack, add...
steps.instruction: In a regular, non-magnetic rack, add the Buffer AVL and carrier RNA to the particle pellet. Suspend the pellet by using the pipette to wash the sides of the conical tube with the lysis buffer, carrier RNA, and 1X PBS mixture.

steps.title: Incubate the sample at Room temperature for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the sample at Room temperature for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Use a magnetic rack to separate...
steps.instruction: Use a magnetic rack to separate the magnetic Nanotrap particles from the sample. Allow sample to sit on the rack for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a 1.7 mL tube and discard the pellet.

steps.title: Add 560 µL of 96% Ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 560 µL of 96% Ethanol P212121 Catalog #BE-BDH1156 to sample. Mix well by pipetting up and down several times.

steps.title: Add 630 µL of the sample...
steps.instruction: Add 630 µL of the sample mix onto a QIAamp Mini column.

steps.title: Repeat Step 26 until all of...
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 26 until all of the sample has gone through the column.

steps.title: Open the QIAamp Mini Column and...
steps.instruction: Open the QIAamp Mini Column and add 500 µL of Buffer AW1 Qiagen Catalog #19081 . Centrifuge the sample at full speed for 00:01:00 . Once complete, discard the filtrate.

steps.title: Open the QIAamp Mini Column and...
steps.instruction: Open the QIAamp Mini Column and add 500 µL of Buffer AW2 Qiagen Catalog #19072 . Centrifuge the sample at full speed for 00:03:00 . Once complete, discard the filtrate.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp Mini Column into...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp Mini Column into a new collection tube and discard the old one containing filtrate. Centrifuge the sample at full speed for 00:01:00 to remove any buffer AW2 carryover.

steps.title: Place the QIAamp Mini Column into...
steps.instruction: Place the QIAamp Mini Column into a final, labeled tube and discard the old one containing the filtrate

steps.title: Open the QIAamp Mini Column and...
steps.instruction: Open the QIAamp Mini Column and add 60 µL of Buffer AVE Qiagen Catalog #1020953 and incubate at Room temperature for 00:03:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge the sample at 16000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the sample at 16000 rpm, °C, for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Separate sample into at least two aliquots
steps.instruction: Separate sample into at least two aliquots. Store in -80 °C freezer until it is ready for PCR.

steps.title: Remove and discard the supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove and discard the supernatant. Do not disturb the pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge sample at full speed for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample at full speed for 00:01:00 . Once complete, discard the filtrate.

steps.title: Transfer the QIAamp Mini Column into...
steps.instruction: Transfer the QIAamp Mini Column into a new collection tube, and discard the tube containing the filtrate.

steps.title: Begin making the 10X PBS Solution by mixing the following
steps.instruction: Begin making the 10X PBS Solution by mixing the following: 80 g NaCl 2 g KCl 14.4 g Na 2 HPO 4 2.4 g KH 2 PO 4 800 mL Ddwater

steps.title: Adjust the solution to pH 7
steps.instruction: Adjust the solution to pH 7.4 by adding 5% NaOH and/or 5% HCl. Swirl the mixture after adding either NaOH or HCl. Use a pH probe in between adding NaOH or HCl to see if the pH has reached 7.4 yet. Wash off tip of probe with DI water in between uses.

steps.title: Add more double distilled water (ddH2O)...
steps.instruction: Add more double distilled water (ddH2O) Contributed by users until the volume is 1000 mL .

steps.title: Dilute the PBS solution by adding...
steps.instruction: Dilute the PBS solution by adding 100 mL of 10X PBS to 900 mL distilled water to create 1X PBS.

steps.title: Dispense mixture into aliquots and autoclave for 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Dispense mixture into aliquots and autoclave for 00:20:00 . Store at room temperature.
